Fitness.name: 10-Minute Morning Stretch
Fitness.description: Do a full body stretching routine immediately after waking up.
Fitness.why: Stretching increases blood flow and prepares your body for movement throughout the day.

Fitness.name: Progressive Overload Tracking
Fitness.description: Log weights and reps for every compound lift to track progression.
Fitness.why: Tracking is the only reliable way to ensure you are continually challenging your muscles to grow.

Productivity.name: Night Before Planning
Productivity.description: Write down the 3 most important tasks for the next day before going to bed.
Productivity.why: Reduces morning decision fatigue and lets you start the day with clear priorities.

Productivity.name: Deep Work Block
Productivity.description: Work for 90 minutes on your most important project with absolutely zero distractions or notifications.
Productivity.why: Deep work is where true value is created, but it requires sustained, unbroken concentration.
